base_score_threshold.reason: Score bucket 12-14 (below current threshold of 14.0) has 91% win rate, avg return 28.7% (n=77). Lowering threshold would capture these profitable near-misses.

base_score_threshold_graded.reason: Score bucket 14-16 has 0% win rate at recommended exit (n=11) — unprofitable when held to the advised exit, not just within 5 days.

max_iv.reason: High-IV options (IV≥0.70) have 2% win rate (n=4707) vs 2% for IV 0.30-0.70. IV crush likely hurting returns after entry.

delta_range.reason: Delta bucket 0.25-0.35 has worst win rate (1%, n=3439). Review delta_good_min / delta_good_max in config.

expiry_window.reason: DTE range 21-30d has the lowest win rate (2%). Review expiry_good_min / expiry_good_max in config.

liquidity.reason: Liquidity contributes avg -1.21 on profitable trades vs -1.95 on losses (diff=0.74, source=efficacy) — strong predictor. Raising weight 1.45 → 1.6. Corroborated by actual hold outcomes (n=52899).

strike.reason: Strike contributes avg 1.11 on profitable trades vs 0.98 on losses (diff=0.13, source=graded) — weak predictor. Lowering weight 1.15 → 1.05 to reduce noise. (graded outcomes only — insufficient efficacy data)

iv.reason: Iv contributes avg 0.39 on profitable trades vs 0.36 on losses (diff=0.03, source=efficacy) — weak predictor. Lowering weight 1.15 → 1.05 to reduce noise.
iv.discrepancy_note: Efficacy (5-day) suggests 'lower' but actual hold outcomes suggest 'raise'. This typically means the factor is predictive short-term but the hold window is misaligned — check hold_adjustment before changing this factor weight.

volatility.reason: Volatility contributes avg -0.23 on profitable trades vs -0.21 on losses (diff=-0.02, source=efficacy) — weak predictor. Lowering weight 0.7 → 0.6 to reduce noise. (efficacy only — insufficient graded data)

sentiment.reason: Sentiment contributes avg -0.40 on profitable trades vs -0.37 on losses (diff=-0.02, source=graded) — weak predictor. Lowering weight 1.0 → 0.9 to reduce noise. (graded outcomes only — insufficient efficacy data)

notes: DISCREPANCY: Score threshold — efficacy (5-day peak) suggests 'lower' but graded outcomes (actual hold) suggest 'raise'. Options may be profitable short-term but fading by the recommended exit, or vice versa. Review hold_adjustment before changing the score threshold.
FN analysis corroborates score threshold suggestion (bucket 12.0 also shows high FN rate).
Factor weight analysis found 5 factor(s) with suggested weight changes.
